TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 9, Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Yemen ta' misuw hya' ga Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, kawas tay 1966 tmasuq mqwas biru , Federation of South Arabia. Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, t'aring kawas tay 1970 tehuk kawas tay 1973, mqwas biru sa pqwsan biru krahu , Soviet Union. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw jemen taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru , *e*eration o* s~ɕoutħ araβia. aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu , s~ɕo*iet union. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 9, Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Yemen ta' misuw hya' ga Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, aring ryax tay 27 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, kawas tay 1966 tmasuq mqwas biru , Federation of South Arabia. Abdrabbuh Mansur Hadi, t'aring kawas tay 1970 tehuk kawas tay 1973, mqwas biru sa pqwsan biru krahu , Soviet Union. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 1994, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw jemen taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. pinqβaqan nja aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, kawas~ɕ taj **** tmas~ɕuq mqwas~ɕ βiru , *e*eration o* s~ɕoutħ araβia. aβ*raββuħ mans~ɕur ħa*i, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu , s~ɕo*iet union. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
